cases.prompt: Create an Obsidian note for Project Alpha with frontmatter, a warning callout, and links to related notes

assertions.text: Adds YAML frontmatter with properties like title, date, and tags at the top
Uses [[wikilinks]] for internal vault links rather than Markdown links

cases.prompt: 위키링크로 다른 노트 임베드하고 블록 ID 다는 법 보여줘

assertions.text: Shows embedding with ![[Note Name]] (! prefix on a wikilink)
Demonstrates defining a block ID by appending ^block-id to a paragraph

cases.prompt: make a collapsed FAQ callout and highlight some text in my Obsidian note

assertions.text: Uses the foldable callout form (e.g. > [!faq]- for collapsed)
Uses ==highlighted text== for Obsidian highlight syntax
